title: colobachne pontica
intro: Colobachne pontica is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in Eastern Australia and is native to Australia and New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Colobachne pontica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling and pain, and even aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Colobachne pontica can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat minor cuts and scrapes, as well as skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
